title: neolepisorus triglossus
intro: Neolepisorus triglossus, also known as the triglossus fern or three-lobed fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neolepisorus triglossus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Neolepisorus triglossus is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in infusions or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
